issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect for 'add 1 card from top or bottom of Life cards to hand'. Should be DrawCard or equivalent action that specifies life card source, not FlipLife (which moves hand cards to life).
PlayFromHand is incorrect for 'add up to 1 Egghead Character to top of Life cards face-up'. This should be AttachDon or a life-add action, not PlayFromHand (which plays to board).
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for 'during this turn'. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' per duration rules.
Second trigger effect (DrawCard + TrashFromHand) has no basis in card text. Card contains only one main effect with three sub-actions, not two separate triggers.
